final:
module top_module(
  input [3:0] _cmp_A,
  input [3:0] B,
  output reg [1:0] result
);always @* begin
    result = 2'b00; // Default output is 00
    if (_cmp_A > B) begin
      result = 2'b01; // _cmp_A is greater than B
    end else if (_cmp_A < B) begin
      result = 2'b10; // _cmp_A is less than B
    end
  end

endmodule
